THE LEASE IS TERMINATED AS OF AUG. 18, 2008, WITH PER DIEMS AT THE RATE OF $72.40 PER DAY. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT, APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE THOMAS J.
